disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden high fever with uncontrollable rigors, onset roughly 3 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: When did the fever and shaking start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on out of nowhere about three hours ago — a burning fever and shaking so violent my teeth are chattering.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dull ache high in the right upper abdomen under the ribs
trigger_question_examples: Can you point to where it hurts?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep dull ache up high on the right side, just under my ribs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New yellowing of the eyes and skin (jaundice) noticed by patient and spouse
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any yellowing of your eyes or skin?
What colour are the whites of your eyes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse says the whites of my eyes and my skin have gone yellow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known 10-year history of ulcerative colitis, on mesalazine
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had ulcerative colitis for about ten years and I take mesalazine for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: One month of progressive fatigue, generalised itching, fluctuating mild yellowing, unintentional weight loss and pale greasy stools
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any symptoms building up over the last few weeks?
Any itching, weight loss or changes in your stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For the last month I've been really tired and itchy all over, my skin has gone a bit yellow on and off, I've lost weight without trying, and my stools have been pale and greasy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A similar but milder episode of fevers and right-sided pain about 6 months ago
trigger_question_examples: Has anything like this happened before?
Have you had episodes of fever and right-sided pain in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had something like this about six months ago but it was milder and settled.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels profoundly unwell, wiped out and toxic — proxy for systemic illness and circulatory strain
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint, weak or like you might pass out?
How unwell do you feel in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely drained and toxic, like all my strength has gone.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Paracetamol taken 2 hours ago produced no reduction in fever
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the fever?
Did the paracetamol help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol a couple of hours ago and it didn't bring the fever down at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Emesis basin at the bedside; feeling nauseated
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel sick or have you vomited?
Is there a bowl or bucket nearby in case you're sick?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel queasy and have a bowl next to the bed just in case.
